name: Taiwan (TSMC)
summary: Day 63 Thursday. TAIEX 39,573.19 (+0.7% 1D, +21.7% 1M, +23.4% 3M) — AI-CYCLE STRUCTURALLY VALIDATED BY MAG 7 BEAT-AND-RAISE CAPEX; HELIUM CASCADE FALSIFICATION CONFIRMED via Samsung Q1 NO HELIUM MENTION. Mag 7 prints Apr 29 evening: Meta capex raised $125-145B (+$10B); Alphabet $180-190B (+$5B); AWS +24% (fastest in 13 quarters), $200B 2026 capex; MSFT capex +89% YoY. Combined Mag 7 2026 AI-capex commitment $630-650B+ — multi-year structural AI demand reinforced; TSMC capex +32% to $54B for 2026 vindicated. SMH +1.7% recovers Apr 28 -3% OpenAI-miss selloff. Helium cascade falsified at tier-1 chipmaker level (SK Hynix Apr 23 + Samsung Apr 30 NO HELIUM MENTION). TAIEX +21.7% 1M is structural AI-cycle, not crisis-conditional. Apple reports tonight 5pm ET (after dossier window) — iPhone-supplier cue for Foxconn Taiwan ecosystem. SemiAnalysis Patel counter-frame: hyperscaler FCF compresses to ~zero by 2027 — structural risk to TSMC customer base. Chip complex decoupled from crisis (~5% crisis attribution).

active_triggers.condition: TSMC announces production reduction or allocation changes due to helium/gas supply

recent_signals.headline: TAIWAN TAIEX -1.0% PROFIT-TAKING AFTER 1M +19.7%; APPLE BEAT REINFORCES TSMC THESIS
